name: python3-awscrt
title: python3-awscrt
summary: Python 3 bindings for the AWS Common Runtime
description:
Python 3 bindings for the AWS Common Runtime
This package contains a number of low-level helper and utility
functions for interacting with Amazon Web Services APIs from within
python programs.  Most application developers will prefer higher
level abstractions such as those provided by the python-boto3
packages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-awscrt because Python 3 bindings for the AWS Common Runtime.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-awscrt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-awscrt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-awscrt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
